steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage directly states “he ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron.” The word “instead” directly connects stopping playwriting to becoming a patron.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly states what the passage claims happened: he stopped writing plays. The other three either contradict the passage or describe changes never mentioned in it. That matches choice C — C is correct.
